name: Dilled Green Beans and New Potatoes
recipeIngredient: 1/2 pound fresh green beans, trimmed and broken into 2-inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium saucepan, bring about 2 cups water to a boil.
2. Add potatoes and green beans; return to a boil. Reduce heat.
3. Cover and simmer for 9-11 minutes or until beans are crisp-tender.
4. Meanwhile, in a small bowl, combine all remaining ingredients; blend well.
5. Drain the vegetables and rinse with cold water to cool slightly.
6. Place in a serving bowl. Add sour cream mixture and toss to coat.
7. Serve immediately or refrigerate until serving time.
Makes 8 (1/2 cup) servings.
Per serving: 50 calories, 0 grams fat, 0% CFF, 0 mg cholesterol, 55 mg sodium.
